apps.name: AllManga Anime
apps.author: Knight-Of-Meta
apps.description: Lot of server options (Mostly fast & smooth), Very large library, Advanced anime info & filter.

apps.name: Animenosub
apps.author: Knight-Of-Meta
apps.description: Multiple server options, Provides both sub & raw video, Long track record (2017), High quality video.

apps.name: Animepahe
apps.author: Knight-Of-Meta
apps.description: Updates and selects the best video source/fansub release, Medium anime library, Simple & consistent video player, Small data usage, Long track record

apps.name: Animestu
apps.author: Knight-Of-Meta
apps.description: Multiple sources & language, Modern interface, Content depends on the websites it scrapes

apps.name: Aniwatch
apps.author: Knight-Of-Meta
apps.description: Large library, Soft subtitle, multi languages, Modern site design, Reliable stream server

apps.name: Kickassanime
apps.author: Knight-Of-Meta
apps.description: High video bitrate, Modern site design, Reliable for new release, Soft subtitle, multi languages

apps.name: Mangafire
apps.author: Knight-Of-Meta
apps.description: Large library, Nice interface, Multi language selection

apps.name: Weeb Central
apps.author: Knight-Of-Meta
apps.description: Mostly high quality official translation, Well organized library

apps.name: Novelfire
apps.author: Knight-Of-Meta
apps.description: Similar with LightNovelWorld, Large library, Text-to-speech support, Multi language support, Decently popular
